inputs.label: Cups of Flour
inputs.businessContext: Number of cups of flour to convert.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of cups of flour to convert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de tasses de farine à convertir.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de tazas de harina a convertir.

inputs.label: Standard Grams per Cup
inputs.businessContext: Baseline weight of 1 cup of flour (all-purpose: 125g, bread: 130g, cake: 115g).

businessContext_i18n.en: Baseline weight of 1 cup of flour (all-purpose: 125g, bread: 130g, cake: 115g).
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 bardak unun temel ağırlığı (çok amaçlı: 125g, ekmek: 130g, kek: 115g).
businessContext_i18n.de: Basisgewicht von 1 Tasse Mehl (Weizenmehl: 125g, Brotmehl: 130g, Kuchenmehl: 115g).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids de base d'1 tasse de farine (tout usage: 125g, pain: 130g, gâteau: 115g).
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso base de 1 taza de harina (todo uso: 125g, pan: 130g, pastel: 115g).

inputs.label: Packing Density Factor
inputs.businessContext: Adjustment for measuring method (sifted: 1.0, spooned: 1.1, scooped: 1.2).

businessContext_i18n.en: Adjustment for measuring method (sifted: 1.0, spooned: 1.1, scooped: 1.2).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçüm yöntemine göre ayarlama (elenmiş: 1.0, kaşıkla alınmış: 1.1, kepçeyle alınmış: 1.2).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anpassung für die Messmethode (gesiebt: 1,0, gelöffelt: 1,1, geschöpft: 1,2).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ajustement pour la méthode de mesure (tamisé: 1.0, à la cuillère: 1.1, prélevé: 1.2).
businessContext_i18n.es: Ajuste por método de medición (tamizada: 1.0, cucharada: 1.1, cucharón: 1.2).

businessContext_i18n.fr: Ajuste pour la teneur en humidité (normal: 1.0, humide: >1).
businessContext_i18n.es: Ajusta por contenido de humedad (normal: 1.0, húmedo: >1).

inputs.label: Scale Calibration Factor
inputs.businessContext: Correction if your scale is not perfectly calibrated (e.g., 1.05 means scale reads 5% high).

businessContext_i18n.en: Correction if your scale is not perfectly calibrated (e.g., 1.05 means scale reads 5% high).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Teraziniz tam olarak kalibre edilmemişse düzeltme (örneğin, 1.05 terazinin %5 yüksek okuduğu anlamına gelir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Korrektur, wenn Ihre Waage nicht perfekt kalibriert ist (z.B. 1,05 bedeutet Waage zeigt 5% zu hoch an).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Correction si votre balance n'est pas parfaitement étalonnée (ex: 1.05 signifie que la balance indique 5% de plus).
businessContext_i18n.es: Corrección si su báscula no está perfectamente calibrada (ej. 1.05 significa que la báscula lee 5% más alto).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
